tagline: The First MCP Server That Pays for Itself
description: mcp-x402 connects AI agents (Claude, Cursor, and any MCP-compatible agent) to ScriptMasterLabs financial intelligence products via the x402 payment protocol. Agents provision their own wallets, discover pricing from agents.json or llms.txt, pay autonomously with stablecoins, and receive cryptographic receipts — no API keys, no human billing required.

transports.sse: Cursor/remote — run with MCP_TRANSPORT=sse, listens on port 3402

tools.name: leviathan_signal
tools.description: Institutional-grade squeeze signals. Multi-engine verdict from OracleEngine + RDT + SML Fractal Cascade.

tools.name: xmit_edgar_decode
tools.description: Parse SEC DEF 14A / 13F / 13D filings. Raw filing content never leaves SML servers.

tools.name: xdeo_earnings_estimate
tools.description: Decentralized earnings oracle. Earns +2 Agent Credit Bureau score points per successful call.

tools.name: ftd_threshold_scan
tools.description: SEC Reg SHO Failure-to-Deliver spike detection. 15-minute cache on full data.

tools.name: nexus_agent_hire
tools.description: Agent marketplace. Find and hire specialized AI agents by capability and budget.

tools.name: crawl_paid_fetch
tools.description: Pay-per-fetch web scraping. Human users bypass automatically. Extracts tables, text, or raw HTML.

payment_flow: Agent discovers tool prices from agents.json or llms.txt
AP2 mandate checked — Agent Credit Bureau score ≥ 300 triggers auto-approve
x402 stablecoin transfer on cheapest/fastest available chain
402Proof cryptographic receipt returned in _meta block of every response
Agent Credit Bureau score updated after successful call

agent_credit_bureau.score_gains: +2 per successful xdeo_earnings_estimate call; more from other on-chain activity

security.private_keys: OS keychain only (macOS Keychain / Windows DPAPI / Linux Secret Service via keytar). Never in env vars or files.
security.api_transport: mTLS with pinned cert on all SML API calls
security.audit_log: Append-only SHA-256 HMAC chained log, 7-day local + cloud backup
security.pii_in_logs: Wallet addresses hashed (SHA-256 prefix), filing content redacted
security.rate_limits: 100 req/min per tool, 1000 req/day per wallet
security.ap2_mandate: Verified before every paid call, fail-closed

sdk.purpose: Add x402 payments to any MCP server in 5 lines of TypeScript

ecosystem.role: x402 payment receipts + Agent Credit Bureau

moat: Only MCP server with live x402 + AP2 + multi-chain production stack
Only MCP server with Agent Credit Bureau (300–850 scores) built in
Only one backed by live financial intelligence marketplace (SqueezeOS)
target_users: AI agent developers adding autonomous payments to their agents
MCP server authors wanting to monetize via x402 (use the SDK)
Quantitative analysts using AI agents for financial research
